heading: How can I pay for an Atlas subscription with a credit card?
body:
To pay for an [elastic billing subscription](atlas-subscriptions) with a
credit card:

- Contact [MongoDB Sales](https://www.mongodb.com/company/contact?tck=docs) to purchase a
  subscription.

- Email a request to [ar@mongodb.com](mailto:ar@mongodb.com) to pay for your active
  subscription with a credit card. Please include your Organization ID
  in your request.

You can find your Organization ID in the Atlas UI, under your
organization's **General Settings**.
